title: Ferrets Galore
description: This mod adds ferret to your world. they can be found in plains and tamed with chicken. when tamed you can pick them up.
body: This is a mod adding little ferret buddys to your world they come in 4 diffrent types the white ferret, the bandit, the grey bandit and the cinnamon ferret. These ferrets can be found in plains biomes and forests. They can be tamed using chicken and when shift-right clicking you can pick them up and even put them on your shoulders.
